end return(function(E,m,c,e,G,S,W,i,s,C,t,o,K,P,n,v,O,B,J,h,p,z,x)i,B,K,z,C,O,v,o,t,p,x,n,h,J,s,P=function(E,D)local m=o(D)local c=function(...)return O(E,{...},D,m)end return c end,function(E,D)local
